posts.text: [VIDEO: A Message for Iran Regime Apologists] Elica Leon, thank you so much for being here. >> Thank you for having me. >> Well, I want to start by asking you to tell us a little bit about yourself. This is the first time some of our audience will be meeting you. Tell us about your background, your personal story, and what brought you to activism and politics specifically. >> Um, so I guess I started speaking out against uh the regime in Iran and sort of raising awareness on my platform with regards to what was happening in Iran. um during the Masamini revolution which was about four years ago now. It was in 2022 when a a young woman um Masamini was killed for you know showing some of her hair in violation of the mandatory hijab laws. posts.text: [VIDEO: Do We Need God? Steven Pinker vs. Ross Douthat Debate] Religion is not the way that we're going to get large groups of people to to come together. >> There's no historical evidence to suggest religion is sort of this uniquely tribalizing force. >> Ross, that is totally irrelevant. Cognition was designed to solve problems. >> Wasn't designed. America was founded based on Christianity. America is the greatest country that's ever existed. And it's because of Judeo-Christian values. Religion has a bad rap over the years have a religious way of understanding the world. We're always moving towards some transcendent God. And I think people are looking for God now. Thank you so much for joining us for this things that matter debate from the free press. I'm Sarah Isgar, editor of Scotas blog and author of Last Branch Standing, a potentially surprising,

posts.text: [VIDEO: The War in Iran, Explained] One week ago, the United States and Israel launched an attack on Iran, an operation the US calls epic [music] fury. Here's everything you need to know about what's happened this past week in the war. After weeks of military buildup in the region, but was the largest since the invasion of Iraq in 2003. Strikes on Iran began Saturday, February 28th, hitting targets across the country. One of the first strikes killed Iran's Supreme Leader, Ali Ham, ending his 36-year rule. Hommin's wife was also killed along with several other highranking Iranian officials. Since Saturday, the US and Israel have hit hundreds of military targets.
